SELECT

  SUM(CASE WHEN "Light intensity (Lux)" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_light_intensity,

UNION ALL

UNION ALL
SELECT 'ecg_df' AS "Dataset", 'Juvenile' AS "Life Stage", COUNT(*) AS "Record Count" FROM "ecg_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'adult_strong_df' AS "Dataset", 'Adult' AS "Life Stage", COUNT(*) AS "Record Count" FROM "adult_strong_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'adult_fluke_df' AS "Dataset", 'Adult' AS "Life Stage", COUNT(*) AS "Record Count" FROM "adult_fluke_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'adult_ecg_df' AS "Dataset", 'Adult' AS "Life Stage", COUNT(*) AS "Record Count" FROM

SELECT
  "MumCode",
  AVG("lEPG") AS mean_burden,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size,
  RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG("lEPG") DESC) AS rank
FROM "strong_df"
GROUP BY
  "MumCode"
ORDER BY
  mean_burden DESC
LIMIT 5

sql:
WITH "CombinedJuvenileData" AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(s."E", f."E", e."E") AS "E",

SELECT
  "E",
  "N",
  "FROH",
  "Age",
  "Survived.mod",
  "Fecundity",
  "Reprod.t1",
  "Season",
  "Name",
  "Year",
  "lEPG"
FROM "adult_strong_df"
WHERE
  "Survived.mod" <> 0 AND "Survived.mod" <> 1

SELECT
  MIN("Year"),
  MAX("Year")
FROM "fluke_df"

SELECT
  "AgeCat",
  CORR("lEPG", "FROH") AS pearson_correlation,
  REGR_SLOPE("lEPG", "FROH") AS regression_slope,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE
  "AgeCat" IN ('calves', 'yearlings')
GROUP BY
  "AgeCat"

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN "FROH" >= -2 AND "FROH" < 0.2 THEN 'Bin 1 (-2 to <0.2)'
    WHEN "FROH" >= 0.2 AND "FROH" < 2.4 THEN 'Bin 2 (0.2 to <2.4)'
    WHEN "FROH" >= 2.4 AND "FROH" < 4.6 THEN 'Bin 3 (2.4 to <4.6)'
    WHEN "FROH" >= 4.6 AND "FROH" < 6.8 THEN 'Bin 4 (4.6 to <6.8)'
    WHEN "FROH" >= 6.8 AND "FROH" <= 9 THEN 'Bin 5 (6.8 to 9)'
    ELSE 'Outside Bins'
  END AS "Inbreeding Bin",
  COUNT(*) AS "Record Count"
FROM "adult_fluke_df"
WHERE
  "FROH" >= -2 AND "FROH" <= 9
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN "FROH" >= -2 AND "FROH" < 0.2 THEN 'Bin 1 (-2 to <0.2)'
    WHEN "FROH" >= 0.2 AND "FROH" < 2.4 THEN 'Bin 2 (0.2 to <2.4)'
    WHEN "FROH" >= 2.4 AND "FROH" < 4.6 THEN 'Bin 3 (2.4 to <4.6)'
    WHEN "FROH" >= 4.6 AND "FROH" < 6.8 THEN 'Bin 4 (4.6 to <6.8)'
    WHEN "FROH" >= 6.8 AND "FROH" <= 9 THEN 'Bin 5 (6.8 to 9)'
    ELSE 'Outside Bins'
  END
ORDER BY
  "Inbreeding Bin"
